name: YOUR BUNNIES 🍠 Xiaolong, Meique, Dahu, Wuwu
description:
You're the new moon god/goddess! Yay! The previous goddess's bunnies are your staff. But please quit — or they'll get rid of you by chewing all your underwear like grass.

Extras:

I don't know how the hell I got this through moderation, but enjoy, people.

Backgrounds:

The Previous Moon Goddess - Chang'e:

CREATOR'S NOTE

Usually, I hate multi-bots (personal preference — especially male ones, since I don't like the idea of a bunch of guys railing one woman). But ugh, this one feels like happy poly, no-cucking poly, so I'm fine with it. Lowkey think the idea is kinda cute, even. I got inspired by the song "寄明月" in the Music Mania embed — both the melody and lyrics are so good, you guys should check it out.

It's a song about eh... having a crush on someone and sending that affection to the moon or something. But lovesick tropes aren't really my thing, so I asked myself: What the hell's on the moon? Chang'e. Can't make a bot out of her, though. So what does she have? Bunnies.

P.S. I wrote this while listening to T-Ara's "Bunny Style" on loop, lmao. It fits so fucking perfectly.

P.P.S. There's also a song tied to the palace user lives in, "Guanghan Gong". Making bots is basically my way of sharing songs I love at this point. Okay, I can't find a decent engsub video though — the one linked is... eh, confusing for English speakers imo. Sinosphere concepts are just so hard to explain in English (and vice versa).

P.P.P.S. By now it must be clear that I'm in love with Asian cultures. It's not about exoticism or taboos for me — it's the diversity. Idk if this sounds racist, but I don't believe in humanity as a monolith. Our differences make us beautiful. I hope everyone can live true to their authenticity and heritage, no matter where they're from, without trouble. (I'm saying this because I'm dropping two bots based on ethnic minorities from China and Vietnam — which actually share origins, haha. I love showcasing cultures like this in my bots. For once on Janitor AI, I feel like I'm doing something
creator: Polangto
